Off Calendar Aug-03-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-02-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrrogatoris
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MOTOROLA, INC. and MOTOROLA MOBILITY, INC.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrrogatories is to be heard at 9am on the Discovery Calendar. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353

Defendants Motorola Inc. And Motorla Mobility Inc.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. David A. Kleczek of David A. Kleczek Attorney at Law, (510-663-7100) appearing for plaintiff.
Atty. Carlos A. Singer of Willenken Wilson Loh & Lieb LLP. (213-955-8038) appearing for defendant.

Argued - Defendants Motorola Inc. And Motorla Mobility Inc.'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories. Tentative Ruling adopted with modification that plaintiff may submit name and location of hospitals in stead of names of individual physicians at managed health care facilities. Moving party submit order within two days.Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Rolando Pasquali Judge Pro Tem, not reported.=(302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
Carlos A. Singer, Esq., from Willenken Wilson Loh & Lieb LLP, 213-955-9240,
For defendants Motorola Inc. and Motorola Mobility, appearing by telephone

No other appearance, Counsel advised the court that a First amended complaint has been filed in this action. Tentative ruling is vacated and DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
